long_description:
in mzone747 deploy, cannot get kubectl results, error : couldn't get current server API group list:

lili2@dal4-qz1-sr1-rk007-s06:~$ mz
mzone747
lili2@dal4-qz1-sr1-rk007-s06:~$
lili2@dal4-qz1-sr1-rk007-s06:~$ kubectl get pods -n genctl |head
E1203 18:27:13.003491 1731066 memcache.go:265] couldn't get current server API group list: Get "https://10.119.45.26:6443/api?timeout=32s": dial tcp 10.119.45.26:6443: i/o timeout
E1203 18:27:43.004452 1731066 memcache.go:265] couldn't get current server API group list: Get "https://10.119.45.26:6443/api?timeout=32s": dial tcp 10.119.45.26:6443: i/o timeout
E1203 18:28:13.005612 1731066 memcache.go:265] couldn't get current server API group list: Get "https://10.119.45.26:6443/api?timeout=32s": dial tcp 10.119.45.26:6443: i/o timeout
E1203 18:28:43.006669 1731066 memcache.go:265] couldn't get current server API group list: Get "https://10.119.45.26:6443/api?timeout=32s": dial tcp 10.119.45.26:6443: i/o timeout
E1203 18:29:13.007876 1731066 memcache.go:265] couldn't get current server API group list: Get "https://10.119.45.26:6443/api?timeout=32s": dial tcp 10.119.45.26:6443: i/o timeout
Unable to connect to the server: dial tcp 10.119.45.26:6443: i/o timeout

lili2@dal4-qz1-sr1-rk007-s06:~$ kubectl get nodes |head
E1203 18:32:19.059758 1781182 memcache.go:265] couldn't get current server API group list: Get "https://10.119.45.26:6443/api?timeout=32s": dial tcp 10.119.45.26:6443: i/o timeout
Incident source: https://github.ibm.com/cloudlab/ipops-dev-request/issues/43270 - Li Li (IaaS CORE)
short_description: deployer dal4-qz1-sr1-rk007-s06 error "couldn't get current server API"
close_notes:
(All Timestamps must be in UTC)
Issue Summary: deployer dal4-qz1-sr1-rk007-s06 error "couldn't get current server API"
SME Findings: sme-team: SME Findings
Reason of Escalation: deployer issue
Resolution Steps:

-added loopback in route

Signature of Issue: deploy issue
Jira/Github/Other Tickets: https://ibm-iaas.atlassian.net/browse/SRE-14889
Category/Subcategory: pod failure/connction
Timeline Summary:

-need root access in deployer
opened https://ibm-iaas.atlassian.net/browse/SRE-14889, 

-loopback reference is missing in route
vitp@dal4-qz1-sr1-rk007-s06:~$ ip r get 10.119.45.26
10.119.45.26 via 172.31.0.12 dev p0 src 172.31.0.13 uid 1640965525
    cache

-root@dal4-qz1-sr1-rk007-s06:~# ip r get 10.119.45.26
10.119.45.26 via 172.31.0.140 dev p1 src 10.119.45.3 uid 0
    cache

-root@dal4-qz1-sr1-rk007-s06:~# nc -zv 10.119.45.26 6443
Connection to 10.119.45.26 6443 port [tcp/*] succeeded!

-confirmation
lili2@dal4-qz1-sr1-rk007-s06:~$  rm -rf ~/.kube
lili2@dal4-qz1-sr1-rk007-s06:~$
lili2@dal4-qz1-sr1-rk007-s06:~$ ksync -m `mz`
